title: Pi Agent explained in 6min..
summary: Caleb Writes Code discusses Pi, described as a unique agent framework that enables diverse use cases like OpenClaw. The video compares Pi's approach to other frontier agents including Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Antigravity, examining how the harness layer becomes more complex as products add agent features.
